title: Component Manifest
description: Deterministic inventory of the shadcn components vendored under a Starter's components/ui/ directory. Generated by scripts/generate_component_manifests.py from components.json + components/ui/ on disk (no LLM calls). One manifest per Starter at data/starters/<starterId>/component-manifest.json. The capability-map.v1.json optional 'components' field is cross-checked against the union of these manifests by scripts/governance_validate.py.

starterId.description: Starter folder name under data/starters/, matching starter-registry.v1.json:starters[].id.

generatedBy.description: The deterministic generator that owns this file. Editing by hand drifts from the disk-scan and is caught by the sync-check test.

componentsJsonPresent.description: Whether the Starter has a components.json at its root (shadcn config). saas-base does not, so this is false there.

style.description: Optional. components.json:style (e.g. base-nova). Omitted when components.json is absent.

iconLibrary.description: Optional. components.json:iconLibrary (e.g. lucide). Omitted when components.json is absent.

uiAlias.description: Optional. components.json:aliases.ui (e.g. @/components/ui). Omitted when components.json is absent.

components.description: Vendored shadcn components found directly under components/ui/ as *.tsx files, sorted by name. Empty when the Starter has no components/ui/ directory (e.g. commerce-base, saas-base) - that is an honest empty inventory, not a missing manifest.

name.description: Component file stem (e.g. button, accordion). This is the name capability-map.v1.json:components entries reference.

path.description: POSIX-relative path from the Starter root (e.g. components/ui/button.tsx).
